metadata.name: lightning_destroys_mortar
metadata.notes: Two Lightning level-3 casts at (26.5,26.5): 5 bolts x 42 dmg x 2 casts = 420 total > 400 Mortar HP. Wall in radius takes 0 damage (target_filter=all_except_walls). Uses full TH6 spell capacity (2 spells, housing_space=1 each).
metadata.author: claude
